children.heading: Liquidation or reliquidation
children.label: a Liquidation or reliquidation
children.text: Notwithstanding or any other provision of law, and subject to subsection (b), the Secretary of the Treasury shall liquidate or reliquidate the entries listed or otherwise described in subsection (c) and refund any duty or excess duty that was paid, as provided in subsection (c).section 1514 of this title
to reconstruct the entry if it cannot be located.

children.label: A
children.text: for which the importer claimed or would have claimed entry under subheading 6810.19.12 of the HTS on or after , and before the effective date of a proclamation issued by the President under with respect to items under such subheading in order to carry out Schedule XX, orOctober 1, 1990section 3513(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: entered on or after , and before , for which entry would have been claimed under subheading 6810.19.12 of the HTS on or after ,January 1, 1989October 1, 1990October 1, 1990

children.label: A
children.text: Any entry, or withdrawal from warehouse for consumption, of goods described in heading 9902.29.95 of the HTS (relating to clomiphene citrate) which was made after , and before , and with respect to which there would have been no duty if the reference to subheading “2922.19.15” in such heading were a reference to subheading “2922.19.15 or any subheading of chapter 30” at the time of such entry or withdrawal, shall be liquidated or reliquidated as free of duty.December 31, 1988January 1, 1993

children.label: B
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall refund any duties paid with respect to entries described in subparagraph (A).
